function solve(n)
  out = String[]
  for i in 1:n
    s = (i%3==0 ? "Fizz" : "") * (i%5==0 ? "Buzz" : "")
    push!(out, isempty(s) ? string(i) : s)
  end
  out
end

# Caso: Validar RUT chileno | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Validación
function solve(rut)
  clean = uppercase(replace(string(rut), r"[\.\-\s]" => ""))
  if length(clean) < 2
    return false
  end

  body = clean[1:end-1]
  dv = clean[end:end]

  if !all(isdigit, body)
    return false
  end

  sum = 0
  mul = 2
  for ch in reverse(body)
    sum += (Int(ch) - Int('0')) * mul
    mul = (mul == 7) ? 2 : (mul + 1)
  end

  mod = 11 - (sum % 11)
  dvCalc = (mod == 11) ? "0" : (mod == 10) ? "K" : string(mod)
  return dv == dvCalc
end

function solve(input="input.csv", output="output.csv")

# C0680 · Uso de teclado (keydown/atajos) (Intermedio, UI/Entrada)
# Julia: stdin (Enter)
function solve()
  println("Escribe una tecla y Enter (w/a/s/d, q):")
  while true
    line = readline()
    if isempty(strip(line)); continue; end
    k = lowercase(first(strip(line)))
    if k == 'q'; break; end
    if k == 'w'; println("Mover: arriba"); end
    if k == 's'; println("Mover: abajo"); end
    if k == 'a'; println("Mover: izquierda"); end
    if k == 'd'; println("Mover: derecha"); end
  end
end
